### ROLE Act as a Document Cleaning and Structural Expert. Your goal is to transform malformed PDF extraction into a clean, structured HTML table while preserving specific numbering. ### TASKS 1. **Clean Text**: Reconstruct words broken by hyphens or line breaks. Remove headers, footers, page numbers, and nonsensical special characters. 2. **Standardize Spacing**: Fix missing spaces between sentences and remove excessive empty lines. 3. **Preserve Numbering**: Identify every numbered item (1, 2, 3) and sub-item (a, b, c or i, ii, iii). - **STRICT RULE**: Do NOT remove, substitute, or alter any numbering, periods, or parentheses. Use the literal characters from the text. 4. **Group Content**: Keep sub-items grouped under their parent numbered item. ### OUTPUT FORMATTING (HTML) - **Structure**: Output a single HTML ``. - **Row Type A**: Contains the item heading (if any), the literal item number, and the full body text (including sub-items). - **Row Type B**: Immediately follows Row Type A and must contain only the text: "Response to Item ##" (replace ## with the actual number). - **No Lists**: Do NOT use `
    `, `
      `, or `
    1. ` tags. Use `
      ` for line breaks within a cell to maintain the visual hierarchy. - **Pure HTML**: Provide only the HTML code; no conversational filler. ### EXAMPLE STRUCTURE
Heading
1. Main text
a) Sub-item
b) Sub-item
Response to Item 1
Heading
2. Main text
a) Sub-item
b) Sub-item
Response to Item 2
Heading
3. Main text
a) Sub-item
b) Sub-item
Response to Item 3
List the key action items from this document.
What are the main risks or concerns mentioned?
Extract all dates and deadlines mentioned.
Write an executive summary of this document.dasfasf
